caption: A man stands in an indoor setting against a background of horizontal light-brown slats. He wears glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt, and a black vest adorned with intricate white embroidery along the edges and red accents at the bottom. In the initial sequence, a person with long brown hair moves across the foreground, partially obstructing the view of the man. As this person exits the frame, the man is revealed standing before a microphone on a stand. He maintains a neutral expression, looking forward as he positions himself to speak. The word "ORCA" appears in white uppercase letters within a white speech bubble graphic in the lower-right section of every scene. The progression of the frames shows the foreground person shifting from the center to the left, clearing the view of the man at the microphone.
